metadata.description: Linked-intent development workflow and arrow-of-intent tracking for Claude Code

plugins.name: linked-intent-dev
plugins.description: Structured design-before-code workflow: HLD → LLD → EARS specs → Implementation plan. Includes setup skill for bootstrapping new projects.

plugins.name: arrow-maintenance
plugins.description: Scaling layer for linked-intent-dev. Tracks spec-to-code coherence across large projects via docs/arrows/ index. Includes brownfield bootstrap for mapping existing codebases.
